title: Lead Investment Banker at Mahindra Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Mahindra Finance
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Mahindra Finance:
Mahindra Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
